subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1919 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Akko is indeed that same Akka which the Franks call Acre. Akka hath acquired diverse names throughout the ages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عاکور همین عکا است که فرنگیها عاکر میگویند عکاء اسامی مختلفه پیدا نمود
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Shrines and Holy places
